steps.t: Darfin, Zhúdo, Rádek, and Sigvith can be found near the gates of Mount Gundabad. Glóin's scouts have not returned from a mission to the gates of Mount…
Zhúdo can be found near Mount Gundabad. You have found only one of Glóin's scouts, Zhúdo. You should talk to Zhúdo and learn what has happened.
Darfin, Rádek, and Sigvith can be found within the encampments of Hanksar-mokh and Kulûg-mokh at the gates of Mount Gundabad. Zhúdo has asked you to r…
Zhúdo can be found near Mount Gundabad. You have recalled the other scouts sent to Gundabad. You should return to Zhúdo.
